name: textarea
description: A token-styled multi-line native textarea (PARTIAL+ENH). Carries a real name/id pair (POSTs JS-off), binds via l:model. Supports sm|md|lg size scale, autosize grow-to-content, live character count (showCount), built-in hint, destructive invalid state (aria-invalid). The textarea-autosize enhancer is the only client bit; without it the bare partial is fully accessible.
docs: Copies the textarea partial to your JTE root at lievit/textarea.jte, reached as @template.lievit.textarea(name=...). The native textarea POSTs under `name` with zero JS; bind to a wire field with `model`. The textarea-autosize enhancer (runtime/features/textarea-autosize.enhancer.ts) adds grow-to-content and live character count when autosize=true or showCount=true; call installTextareaAutosize(runtime) in your app main.ts. The source is yours: edit freely.
